gist.headline: PowerShell gets pollinated
gist.blurb: You can now generate images, text, and audio directly from your PowerShell scripts thanks to the new PollinationsAiPS integration. Time to make those admin scripts a lot more creative!
gist.summary: Added PollinationsAiPS to the community showcase, enabling developers to generate AI content directly from PowerShell scripts.
gist.impact: Windows power users and sysadmins can now easily integrate AI generation capabilities into their command-line workflows.
gist.visual_concept: PowerShell is represented by a classic blue terminal screen. Polly the bee acting as a sysadmin, interacting with a retro computer terminal to symbolize command-line scripting.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny sysadmin tie, typing on a retro computer terminal with a glowing blue command-line screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel blue gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
